case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. BRE ONNA CHANICE RICHARD

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY TONY S. MIGUEL, JR.--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. D-506.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICHARD, BRE ONNA CHANICE $2,811.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.96 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,841.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, JUDGEMENT SATISFIED PER PLAITIFF'S SIGNATURE VERIFICATION DATED 12/11/15 AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARD, BRE ONNA CHANICE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,811.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARD, BRE ONNA CHANICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.96) SERVED NOV-04-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARD, BRE ONNA CHANICE
